goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'broxbourne'.
The train should leave on 'saturday' and should 'leave after 08:30'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'entertainment' and should be in the 'centre'.
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in 'the type of museum'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should depart from broxbourne
The train should leave on saturday and should leave after 08:30
Make sure you get arrival time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of entertainment and should be in the centre
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in the type of museum
Make sure you get postcode and address
